rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees only when concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations are available
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in assumptions and guarantees
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers when available, otherwise use concrete values
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, constants, and assignments
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Avoid placing assumptions and guarantees in implementation scopes when referring to component ports
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
